title: Quartz Decrafting
description: A datapack that makes it so you can decraft quartz blocks.
body:
# ❓What is this?
Quartz Decrafting is a simple datapack that makes it so a quartz block, can be decrafted, instead of only being decoration, it is now a compacting method..

## Crafting Example ℹ️
![GIF Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e862acf1c7d8da8d049c8b2d3a19f42a57090e38.gif)

# ❔ Why use this?
This datapack is pretty useful, when you want to compress your block, but get ore back after, like diamond blocks & iron blocks. This makes it so you can store more items at once, after compressing your block.
